revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十五]][[zh:六月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十五]][[zh:六月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十五]][[zh:六月十五]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 15 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月15日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 15일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 15 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十五]][[zh:六月十五]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 15|qq=June 15}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 15일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 15''' is the 15th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}} . == Events == * Year 2 of {{ill|Yuanxi|ja|元熙 (東晋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yuanxi|1=Yuanxi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q8011604}} / Year 1 of {{ill|Yongchu|ja|永初 (南朝宋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yongchu|1=Yongchu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5370510}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|qid=Q2701|lt=July 11|1=July 11}} , {{ill|420|en|420|qid=Q400971|lt=420|1=420}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Gong of Jin|en|Emperor Gong of Jin|qid=Q7404|lt=Gong of Jin|1=Emperor Gong of Jin}} abdicated in favor of {{ill|Emperor Wu of Song|en|Emperor Wu of Song|qid=Q49699|lt=Liu Yu (Emperor Wu of Song)|1=Emperor Wu of Song}} (Emperor Wu), leading to the fall of the Eastern Jin and the establishment of the {{ill|Liu Song dynasty|en|Liu Song dynasty|qid=Q49697|lt=Liu Song|1=Liu Song dynasty}} dynasty. * Year 3 of {{ill|Jōkyū|en|Jōkyū|qid=Q1195428|lt=Jōkyū|1=Jōkyū}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 6|en|July 6|qid=Q2695|lt=July 6|1=July 6}} , {{ill|1221|en|1221|qid=Q5393|lt=1221|1=1221}} ) – The {{ill|Jōkyū War|en|Jōkyū War|qid=Q1372308|lt=Jōkyū War|1=Jōkyū War}} ended. * Year 4 of [[Kangen]]{{efn|February 1243 to February 1247|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kangen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 29|en|July 29|qid=Q2717|lt=July 29|1=July 29}} , {{ill|1246|en|1246|qid=Q5441|lt=1246|1=1246}} ) – {{ill|Dōgen|en|Dōgen|qid=Q318064|lt=Dōgen|1=Dōgen}} renamed {{ill|Echizen Daibutsu-ji|ja|越前大佛寺|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Echizen Daibutsu-ji|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} to {{ill|Eihei-ji|en|Eihei-ji|qid=Q1303633|lt=Eihei-ji|1=Eihei-ji}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Genji era|en|Genji era|qid=Q1325419|lt=Genji (1864)|1=Genji era}} ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}} , {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} ) – {{ill|Goryōkaku|en|Goryōkaku|qid=Q1196357|lt=Goryōkaku|1=Goryōkaku}} began operations as the Edo Bakufu’s Hakodate magistrate office.
== Births == * Year 3 of {{ill|Tianqi|ja|天啓 (明)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianqi|1=Tianqi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q857085}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 2|en|July 2|qid=Q2697|lt=July 2|1=July 2}} , {{ill|1623|en|1623|qid=Q6818|lt=1623|1=1623}} ) – {{ill|Tansui Ueekata|en|Tansui Ueekata|qid=Q10932024|lt=Kōchi Kenchū|1=Tansui Ueekata}} , musician of the {{ill|Ryukyu Kingdom|en|Ryukyu Kingdom|qid=Q28025|lt=Ryukyu Kingdom|1=Ryukyu Kingdom}} (d. {{ill|1684|en|1684|qid=Q7654|lt=1684|1=1684}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Keian|en|Keian|qid=Q1146135|lt=Keian|1=Keian}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|1649|en|1649|qid=Q6945|lt=1649|1=1649}} ) – {{ill|Abe Masatake|ja|阿部正武|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Abe Masatake|1=Abe Masatake|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10565437}} , lord of {{ill|Oshi Domain|en|Oshi Domain|qid=Q3034405|lt=Oshi Domain|1=Oshi Domain}} (d. {{ill|1704|en|1704|qid=Q6824|lt=1704|1=1704}} ) * Year 6 of {{ill|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1146161}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}} , {{ill|1769|en|1769|qid=Q7679|lt=1769|1=1769}} ) – {{ill|Satō Nobuhiro|en|Satō Nobuhiro|qid=Q5368242|lt=Satō Nobuhiro|1=Satō Nobuhiro}} , philosopher and economist (d. {{ill|1850|en|1850|qid=Q7653|lt=1850|1=1850}} ) * Year 3 of {{ill|Bunsei|en|Bunsei|qid=Q1327119|lt=Bunsei|1=Bunsei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|1820|en|1820|qid=Q6973|lt=1820|1=1820}} ) – {{ill|Hamaguchi Goryō|en|Hamaguchi Goryō|qid=Q5586998|lt=Hamaguchi Goryō|1=Hamaguchi Goryō}} , entrepreneur and philanthropist (d. {{ill|1885|en|1885|qid=Q7821|lt=1885|1=1885}} )
== Deaths == * Year 4 of {{ill|Keiun|en|Keiun|qid=Q428753|lt=Keiun|1=Keiun}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 18|en|July 18|qid=Q2730|lt=July 18|1=July 18}} , {{ill|707|en|707|qid=Q399664|lt=707|1=707}} ) – {{ill|Emperor Monmu|en|Emperor Monmu|qid=Q357246|lt=Emperor Monmu|1=Emperor Monmu}} , 42nd emperor (b. {{ill|683|en|683|qid=Q33496|lt=683|1=683}} ) * Year 3 of {{ill|Ninji|en|Ninji|qid=Q1194262|lt=Ninji|1=Ninji}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|1242|en|1242|qid=Q5437|lt=1242|1=1242}} ) – {{ill|Hōjō Yasutoki|en|Hōjō Yasutoki|qid=Q1188359|lt=Hōjō Yasutoki|1=Hōjō Yasutoki}} , 3rd {{ill|Shikken|en|Shikken|qid=Q1045904|lt=Shikken|1=Shikken}} of the {{ill|Kamakura shogunate|en|Kamakura shogunate|qid=Q736839|lt=Kamakura shogunate|1=Kamakura shogunate}} (b. {{ill|1183|en|1183|qid=Q19723|lt=1183|1=1183}} ) * Year 6 of {{ill|Enpō|en|Enpō|qid=Q1145735|lt=Enpō|1=Enpō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 2|en|August 2|qid=Q2785|lt=August 2|1=August 2}} , {{ill|1678|en|1678|qid=Q7634|lt=1678|1=1678}} ) – {{ill|Tōfukumon-in|ja|東福門院|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tōfukumon-in|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 徳川和子|1=Tokugawa Masako|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q911334}} (Tokugawa Masako), consort of {{ill|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|en|Emperor Go-Mizunoo|qid=Q320229|lt=Emperor Go-Mizunoo|1=Emperor Go-Mizunoo}} and daughter of {{ill|Tokugawa Hidetada|en|Tokugawa Hidetada|qid=Q314464|lt=Tokugawa Hidetada|1=Tokugawa Hidetada}} (b. {{ill|1607|en|1607|qid=Q6756|lt=1607|1=1607}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|qid=Q1145262|lt=Hōei|1=Hōei}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 4|en|August 4|qid=Q2784|lt=August 4|1=August 4}} , {{ill|1705|en|1705|qid=Q6830|lt=1705|1=1705}} ) – {{ill|Kitamura Kigin|ja|北村季吟|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kitamura Kigin|1=Kitamura Kigin|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1743840}} , waka poet and haiku master (b. {{ill|1624|en|1624|qid=Q6821|lt=1624|1=1624}} )
== Commemorations == * In {{ill|Okinawa|ja|沖縄|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Okinawa|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 沖縄県}} , the {{ill|Bischofia javanica|en|Bischofia javanica|qid=Q8248272|lt=Akagi tree|1=Bischofia javanica}} in {{ill|Shuri, Okinawa|en|Shuri, Okinawa|qid=Q608415|lt=Shuri, Naha|1=Shuri, Okinawa}} , a designated {{ill|Natural monument|en|Natural monument|qid=Q23790|lt=Natural Monument of Japan|1=Natural monument}} , is believed to house a deity that descends on Lunisolar June 15 to grant wishes. * {{ill|June Umachii|ja|六月ウマチー|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June Umachii|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Okinawan rice harvest ritual): Centered around Lunisolar June 15, religious ceremonies are conducted at places of worship by priestesses, offering new rice, sacred sake (fermented rice miki), and five types of water (awamori). Many regions also hold tug-of-war competitions on this day.
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|14|6|16|5|15|7|6|0615|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
